REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE RECORDED DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO (1) THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE IN LIGHT OF JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS RE: DATES OF RECORDATION OF THE FORECLOSURE DOCUMENTS; (2) THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE REQUISITE RELATIONSHIP TO ALLEGE CONCEALMENT AND TO ALLEGE ALL ELEMENTS OF FRAUD WITH SPECIFICITY; (3) THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: FRAUDULENT, UNLAWFUL OR UNFAIR PRONGS; (4) AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE THE REQUISITE RELATIONSHIP AND BALANCE DUE TO PLAINTIFF ON ACCOUNT. THE COURT DENIEDS REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED.

PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSE AND TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION IS OVERRULED, PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT THE AMOUNT DEMANDED IN AUGUST 29, 2012 NOD WAS OVERSTATED. (FAC PARAGRAPH 19). DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY. DEMURER TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FRO ACCOUNTING IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THAT SOME BALANCE IS DUE TO PLAINTIFF ON THE LOAN AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lesley Williams, Esq. (866-448-4989) of Ruben Ruiz for Plaintiff/ moving party United Three Groups.
Michael Starkey, Esq. (415-597-7816) of French Lyon Tang for Defendant/opposing party EAST WEST BANK.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling on both motions. Plaintiff seeks clarification on cases cited on opposition. ARGUED. Plaintiff Argued. Defendant responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs is DENIED. By this action Plaintiff challenged the foreclosure. The defense of this litigation is an expense necessary to protect Lender's right under the Deed of Trust. The attorneys' fees clauses in the Deed of Trust and the Note are sufficiently broad to encompass this action and this action arises out of/involves a contract containing a broad fee provision. Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sophia Priola, Esq., French & Lyon (415)597-7816 for Defendant/Moving party East West Bank
Susan Petro, Esq., (415)586-3066 for Planitiff/Opposing party United Three Groups

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action for wrongful foreclose and to the third cause of action for UCL violation is overruled, Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that the amount demanded in August 29, 2012 NOD was overstated. (FAC paragraph 19). Demurrer to the second cause of action for fraud is sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action with requisite specificity. Demurer to the fourth cause of action fro accounting is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege that some balance is due to Plaintiff on the loan at issue in this case. Plaintiff has ten days from notice of entry of order to file amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Susan Petro, Esq., (415-586-3066) for Plaintiff/Moving party United Three Groups, Inc.
Patricia Lyon, Esq., (415-597-7849)of French & Lyon for Defendant/Opposing party East West Bank.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Defendant's request for judicial notice of the recorded documents is granted. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to (1) the first cause of action to allege each element of wrongful foreclosure in light of judicially noticeable documents re: dates of recordation of the foreclosure documents; (2) the second cause of action to allege facts giving rise to the requisite relationship to allege concealment and to allege all elements of fraud with specificity; (3) the third cause of action to allege facts re: fraudulent, unlawful or unfair prongs; (4) as to the fourth cause of action to allege the requisite relationship and balance due to Plaintiff on account. The court denieds request for sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
